summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to O'Neil's Bloomberg Opinion column arguing that Mark Zuckerberg and other major tech leaders are unprepared for the societal responsibilities their platforms carry. The post serves primarily as a teaser linking to the full argument published elsewhere. O'Neil characterizes her take as 'snarky,' signaling her critical stance toward Silicon Valley leadership.
key_points: Tech industry leaders like Zuckerberg lack the depth to handle the societal implications of their platforms
This criticism extends beyond Zuckerberg to 'all the big boys of tech'
O'Neil positions herself as a regular Bloomberg Opinion contributor offering critical tech commentary
money_quotes: Mark Zuckerberg Is Totally Out of His Depth
And so are all the big boys of tech
key_insight: The titans of tech have built platforms with enormous societal impact but lack the wisdom and preparation to responsibly manage them.
